body_text_quoted.text:
Hey Stephanie,  
  
Just shooting you this quick email,  
we got your request for more catering info,  
and our event planner will connect shortly.

  
❤️ - Comeketo Catering

  

  

  

p.s. check out [this quick video](https://dom-12.wistia.com/medias/bu7v9ttoaa)
to see what's in store when you select our Brazilian BBQ Option

  

  

  

  

  

  

  

[![email_photo.jpeg](cid:2c29-00e4-b267)](https://dom-12.wistia.com/medias/bu7v9ttoaa)

  

  

  
\--

Regards,  
**Toni Llagas**

**Comeketo Catering**  
👤 **Sales & Event Consulting Team**

📲 My Direct Line: [(978) 7](tel:9787092442)40 -7311

📲 Catering Main: [(978) 381-1212](tel:9783811212)  
[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/comeketocatering) | [Instagram](https://instagram.com/comeketocatering) | [Website](https://comeketocatering.com/)

  

  

To stop receiving these emails, click
[here](https://app.close.com/go/unsubscribe/orga_pOyYOigKEELdmODukgjigCD5pTRewtmBW1yq6YXkskq/sabruno1@verizon.net/Bmzfw19Y_agpto29iI7WtSHPDE0LEYVRL8dOJJ1Ls7E=/)
